name: Cemat A/S
summary: Cemat A/S engages in the operation, development, and sale of properties in Warsaw. The company is involved in the letting of premises and land; and provision of utilities, including power, water and technical gas, facility services, etc. to its tenants. Its portfolio includes land for office, warehouse and production facilities, and investment development sites. As of December 31, 2020, the company had 116 warehouse tenants and total occupancy level approximately 27,215 sqm. The company was formerly known as Topsil Semiconductor Materials A/S and changed its name to Cemat A/S in July 2016. Cemat A/S was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.
